title: Calendly Event Type
description: An event type defines a kind of meeting that can be scheduled through Calendly, including its name, duration, location configuration, custom questions, and availability settings.

uri.description: The canonical URI of the event type resource.

name.description: The name of the event type displayed to invitees.

active.description: Whether the event type is currently active and available for scheduling.

booking_method.description: The booking method for the event type.

slug.description: The URL-friendly slug for the event type.

scheduling_url.description: The public URL of the event type's scheduling page.

duration.description: The default duration of the event in minutes.

kind.description: Whether the event type is for one-on-one or group meetings.

pooling_type.description: For team event types, the strategy for assigning hosts to meetings.

type.description: The type classification of the event type.

color.description: The hex color code associated with the event type for display purposes.

description_plain.description: The plain text description of the event type.

description_html.description: The HTML-formatted description of the event type.

internal_note.description: An internal note visible only to the event host, not shown to invitees.

secret.description: Whether the event type is hidden from the user's public scheduling page.

deleted_at.description: The timestamp when the event type was deleted, if applicable.

custom_questions.description: Custom questions displayed on the booking page for invitees to answer.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the event type was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the event type was last updated.

Profile.description: The profile (user or team) associated with the event type.

type.description: The type of profile that owns the event type.

name.description: The name of the profile owner.

owner.description: The URI of the profile owner (user or organization).

CustomQuestion.description: A custom question displayed on the event type booking page.

uuid.description: The UUID of the custom question.

name.description: The text of the question displayed to invitees.

type.description: The type of input expected for the answer.

position.description: The display order of the question on the booking page.

enabled.description: Whether the question is currently enabled and visible.

required.description: Whether the invitee must provide an answer to proceed with booking.

answer_choices.description: The available answer choices for single_select and multi_select questions.

include_other.description: Whether an 'Other' free-text option is included for select-type questions.
